legend.automated: Verified in the authoring DOM by an it() block.
legend.deferred: Documented as it.skip() — requires login/activity bootstrap, Offline Step, file pickers, math render, Preview/Reader/Publish, or persistence flows.

mappings.reason: Launch Studio URL + listing page — environment bootstrap handled by cy.openAuthoringTool, not a component assertion
Create math activity (basic info) — activity-creation flow outside authoring DOM
Start authoring redirect — activity-creation flow outside authoring DOM
Add Generic Step — step-creation flow; Text is a canvas element, not a Generic Step widget
Enter Step Title — step-wizard flow outside the Text element
Cancel button in step creation — step-wizard flow
Change Step button — step-wizard flow
Enter Instructions for Students — page-level field, not the Text element
Enter Instructions for Teachers — page-level field, not the Text element

mappings.it: TC_10/TC_12/TC_13 — Text component is placed successfully in the layout

mappings.reason: Drag Text into Offline Step — Offline Step type not provisioned in this harness

mappings.it: TC_10/TC_12/TC_13 — Text component is placed successfully in the layout
mappings.note: Student Instructions is the canvas page used for the element drop

mappings.it: TC_10/TC_12/TC_13 — Text component is placed successfully in the layout
mappings.note: Teacher Instructions shares the same element-drop mechanism

TC_17 — "Drop Cap" style is selectable
TC_18 — "Emphasis Text" style is selectable

mappings.it: TC_22 — Right-align control is present in the rich-text toolbar
mappings.note: graceful when toolbar overlay not mounted

TC_24 — Empty body retains its empty/placeholder state (no crash)

mappings.reason: Excessive (10+) line breaks handling — visual/limit assertion best seen in Preview

TC_29/TC_30 — Math equation control is present in the rich-text toolbar

mappings.reason: Publish activity with Text — Publish flow outside authoring DOM
Launch published activity in Reader — Reader flow
Edit + republish reflected in Reader — Publish/Reader flow
No data loss after republish + reload — persistence-after-reload
Preview before publishing — Preview flow
Publish with missing metadata blocked — Publish validation flow
Preview of text with all applied styles — Preview rendering

TC_39 — "Apply to all" button is present

mappings.reason: Publish Text with no content (empty render/hidden) — Publish flow
